name: Andrea Cassoni's Buckeyes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the smooth peanut butter and butter until well mixed.
2. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar to the mixture and continue stirring until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Shape the mixture into small balls (about 2 inches in diameter).
4. Melt 1 package of chocolate chips and 1/4 bar of paraffin wax together in a double boiler over low heat.
5. Dip each ball into the melted chocolate and paraffin wax mixture, ensuring they are fully coated.
6. Place the dipped balls on wax paper to cool completely before serving or storing.
